reviews.comment:
Solo utilicé el servicompras, buena atención con los clásicos productos que se encuentran en esta red. El lugar es chico pero no estaba lleno. Buen lugar para estirar las piernas al aire libre. Los sanitarios necesitaban un poco de higiene y modernización.

(Translated by Google)
I only used the convenience store; the service was good, and they had the usual products you'd find at this chain. The place is small but not crowded. It's a nice spot to stretch your legs outdoors. The restrooms could use some cleaning and updating.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtd1BTNzZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar para parar promedio, valor de estadía normal. Restaurant con valores altos. Descuento para socios ACA que dejan los precios en valores de CABA moderados. Muy baja cobertura de wifi en las habitaciones del fondo casi nula. Instalación eléctrica (luminarias) y grifería modernas. Para estar de paso es un buen lugar para aprovechar, descansar y seguir el destino

(Translated by Google)
Average place to stay, average price. Restaurant with high prices. Discount for ACA members, which lowers prices to moderate CABA prices. Wi-Fi coverage is very poor in the back rooms, almost nonexistent. Modern electrical installations (lighting) and faucets. For those passing through, this is a good place to take advantage of, rest, and continue on to their destination.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHNzgzRkZREAE
